race.comment: MISS BUSSLINGER (4) six weeks between runs when she drifted back early before slicing through the field with an eye-catching seventh over 1400m at Randwick in the soft (7) going. Gets a much better set-up for this with the 3kg claim and ready to win. MAYBE MOET (17) up in class when improved sharply to finish a narrow second over 1200m here at latest. This is her pet trip and the fast tempo suits. LA BASILIQUE (7) lightly raced filly with the upside to put these away. Slow into stride and warmed up late to finish tenth over 1100m at Scone in the LR Denises Joy. Since fitted with a 900m tick over trial. Out to her right trip and can defeat the mares. SWIFTIE HARRIET (9) comes over from Morphettville after racing without luck in Group company. Races best with her runs spaced and will benefit with the 2kg claim. Slashing run at Flemington last start and stays in the mix. TICKLEBELLY (3) tough Goulburn mare holding form and not without each way claims.
